gameFinished.aiAnalysisPowered: Get a detailed analysis of your answers
gameFinished.aiModalDesc: AI will take a deep dive into your answers from this game and prepare a personalized compatibility report just for you two.
gameFinished.aiModalFeature1: Your strengths and what you have in common
gameFinished.aiModalFeature2: Where you differ and what it means
gameFinished.aiResultLoadingWarn: Please don't close this page, almost ready!
gameFinished.aiResultError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
gameFinished.aiResultLeaveMessage: Your analysis will no longer be accessible once you close this page. The coins used for this analysis have already been deducted.

quotes.perfect: You two think alike. That's rare. Don't take it for granted.
quotes.great: You're on the same wavelength. That's the foundation of something real.
quotes.good: You get each other. That's more than most people ever find.
quotes.midHigh: You've got enough in common to build on. The rest is up to you.
quotes.mid: You're different, but that can work. If you want it to.
quotes.midLow: You don't see eye to eye on much. That's okay. Opposites exist for a reason.
quotes.low: You're pretty different. That's fine. Sometimes that's exactly what works.
quotes.veryLow: You're pretty different. That's fine. Sometimes that's exactly what works.

knowMeWell.aiButtonSub: A detailed AI analysis of what you still don't know about each other
knowMeWell.aiModalDesc: AI will dig into the questions you got wrong about each other and reveal what you still have to learn.

knowMeWell.aiModalFeature3: Tips to understand each other better
